scripts.ui:test:local:core: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const result = spawnSync('npx', ['playwright', 'test', '--config=playwright.config.ts'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env: { ...process.env, NODE_ENV: 'development', PLAYWRIGHT_PROFILE: 'local' } }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.ui:test:local: npm run env:check && npm run ui:test:local:core
scripts.ui:test:prod-config:core: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const env = { ...process.env, NODE_ENV: process.env.NODE_ENV || 'production', PLAYWRIGHT_PROFILE: process.env.PLAYWRIGHT_PROFILE || 'prod-config', VITE_BACKEND_BASE_URL: process.env.VITE_BACKEND_BASE_URL || 'https://api.officialmerch.tech', VITE_API_BASE_PROD: process.env.VITE_API_BASE_PROD || 'https://api.officialmerch.tech', VITE_API_BASE_DEV: process.env.VITE_API_BASE_DEV || 'http://localhost:3000', VITE_API_BASE_URL: process.env.VITE_API_BASE_URL || 'https://api.officialmerch.tech', PROD_CONFIG_HOSTNAME: process.env.PROD_CONFIG_HOSTNAME || 'officialmerch.tech' }; const result = spawnSync('npx', ['playwright', 'test', '--config=playwright.config.ts', '--project=config-contracts'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true, env }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);"
scripts.ui:test:prod-config: npm run env:check:prod && npm run ui:test:prod-config:core
scripts.ui:regression: npx playwright test tests/admin tests/forms tests/commerce tests/onboarding tests/auth
scripts.ci:local: npm run check:utf8 && npm run build:ci && npm run ui:test:local
scripts.ci:prod-config: npm run check:utf8 && npm run ui:test:prod-config
